description: Canonical Measurement.type tokens for cardiovascular telemetry (SPEC §4.1/§4.5, OB-13). A narrow, hand-curated seed of the high-frequency wedge every mainstream health/fitness platform already exposes, not an exhaustive clinical taxonomy. Recommended UCUM unit noted per token in its description as a hint only — the record's own `unit` field is authoritative (§4.1), not this file.

tokens.label: Heart Rate
tokens.description: Instantaneous or windowed heart rate. Recommended unit: /min.

tokens.label: Heart Rate Variability
tokens.description: Most commonly RMSSD; producers SHOULD note the method (RMSSD/SDNN/etc.) in provenance or notes if not RMSSD. Recommended unit: ms.
